configurePresets.name: ninja-release
configurePresets.description: Does not rely on CMake locating a Visual Studio instance via vswhere -- just needs cl.exe/link.exe on PATH (e.g. via a Developer Command Prompt or the ilammy/msvc-dev-cmd GitHub Action). This is what GitHub Actions builds with.
